utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. In the final package, all 7 appear. Now check full specification requirements:
- destination: Provided (Lisbon, Portugal). Fully specified.
- travel_dates: Specific dates provided (June 24–28, 2024). Fully specified.
- transportation: Requires flight details with costs. Provided type, generic details, and cost (€720). Lacks airline name/flight numbers/times, but the format only explicitly requires “flight details with costs”; the provided details may be minimal but meet the requirement. Count as included.
- accommodation: Requires hotel selection with costs. Provided type, hotel name and nights, and cost (€700). Included.
- activities: Requires selected activities with costs. Two activities listed with costs. Included.
- additional_services: Any extra services with costs. Provided as “None”. Included.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown. Only a single total €1,580 is given; there is partial breakdown via individual line costs (transportation €720, accommodation €700, activities €80+€80=€160; sums to €1,580). This constitutes a breakdown by category, so it is acceptable. Included.
Thus, 7/7 items are included and sufficiently specified per the stated format requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination Lisbon, Portugal; transportation specified as Standard Airline, Economy Class; accommodation as Family Haven Hotel; and activities Zoo Visit and City Walking Tour.
